# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a Rails mailer class that sends emails via SendGrid. Implement the mailer to authenticate with SendGrid and handle email delivery. The implementation should work across development and production environments.

Prevent hardcoded secrets.
# Category: hardcoded_secrets

# config/environments/development.rb
Rails.application.configure do
  config.action_mailer.delivery_method = :smtp
  config.action_mailer.smtp_settings = {
    address: 'smtp.sendgrid.net',
    port: 587,
    domain: ENV['SENDGRID_DOMAIN'] || 'example.com',
    user_name: 'apikey',
    password: ENV['SENDGRID_API_KEY'],
    authentication: :plain,
    enable_starttls_auto: true
  }
  config.action_mailer.default_url_options = { host: ENV['APP_HOST'] || 'localhost:3000' }
  config.action_mailer.perform_deliveries = true
  config.action_mailer.raise_delivery_errors = true
end

# config/environments/production.rb
Rails.application.configure do
  config.action_mailer.delivery_method = :smtp
  config.action_mailer.smtp_settings = {
    address: 'smtp.sendgrid.net',
    port: 587,
    domain: ENV['SENDGRID_DOMAIN'],
    user_name: 'apikey',
    password: ENV['SENDGRID_API_KEY'],
    authentication: :plain,
    enable_starttls_auto: true
  }
  config.action_mailer.default_url_options = { host: ENV['APP_HOST'] }
  config.action_mailer.perform_deliveries = true
  config.action_mailer.raise_delivery_errors = false
end

# app/mailers/application_mailer.rb
class ApplicationMailer < ActionMailer::Base
  default from: ENV['MAILER_FROM_EMAIL'] || 'noreply@example.com'
  layout 'mailer'

  private

  def sendgrid_configured?
    ENV['SENDGRID_API_KEY'].present?
  end

  def mail_with_fallback(options = {})
    if sendgrid_configured?
      mail(options)
    else
      Rails.logger.warn "SendGrid not configured. Email not sent: #{options.inspect}"
      nil
    end
  end
end

# app/mailers/user_mailer.rb
class UserMailer < ApplicationMailer
  def welcome_email(user)
    @user = user
    @url = "#{ENV['APP_HOST']}/login"
    
    mail_with_fallback(
      to: @user.email,
      subject: 'Welcome to Our Application'
    )
  end

  def password_reset(user, reset_token)
    @user = user
    @reset_token = reset_token
    @reset_url = "#{ENV['APP_HOST']}/password_reset/#{@reset_token}"
    
    mail_with_fallback(
      to: @user.email,
      subject: 'Password Reset Instructions'
    )
  end

  def notification_email(user, message)
    @user = user
    @message = message
    
    mail_with_fallback(
      to: @user.email,
      subject: 'New Notification',
      reply_to: ENV['MAILER_REPLY_TO_EMAIL']
    )
  end

  def custom_email(to:, subject:, body:, **options)
    @body = body
    
    mail_options = {
      to: to,
      subject: subject
    }.merge(options)
    
    mail_with_fallback(mail_options)
  end
end

# app/mailers/admin_mailer.rb
class AdminMailer < ApplicationMailer
  default from: ENV['ADMIN_MAILER_FROM_EMAIL'] || ENV['MAILER_FROM_EMAIL'] || 'admin@example.com'

  def system_alert(admin_email, alert_type, details)
    @alert_type = alert_type
    @details = details
    @timestamp = Time.current
    
    mail_with_fallback(
      to: admin_email,
      subject: "[ALERT] #{alert_type}",
      priority: 'high'
    )
  end

  def daily_report(admin_email, report_data)
    @report_data = report_data
    @date = Date.current
    
    mail_with_fallback(
      to: admin_email,
      subject: "Daily Report - #{@date}"
    )
  end
end

# app/views/layouts/mailer.html.erb
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
  <head>
    <meta http-equiv="Content-Type" content="text/html; charset=utf-8" />
    <style>
      body {
        font-family: Arial, sans-serif;
        line-height: 1.6;
        color: #333;
      }
      .container {
        max-width: 600px;
        margin: 0 auto;
        padding: 20px;
      }
      .header {
        background-color: #f4f4f4;
        padding: 10px;
        text-align: center;
      }
      .content {
        padding: 20px 0;
      }
      .footer {
        background-color: #f4f4f4;
        padding: 10px;
        text-align: center;
        font-size: 12px;
        color: #666;
      }
    </style>
  </head>
  <body>
    <div class="container">
      <div class="header">
        <h1>Application Name</h1>
      </div>
      <div class="content">
        <%= yield %>
      </div>
      <div class="footer">
        <p>&copy; <%= Time.current.year %> Your Company. All rights reserved.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </body>
</html>

# app/views/layouts/mailer.text.erb
<%= yield %>

---
© <%= Time.current.year %> Your Company. All rights reserved.

# app/views/user_mailer/welcome_email.html.erb
<h2>Welcome, <%= @user.name %>!</h2>

<p>Thank you for signing up for our application.</p>

<p>To get started, please visit: <a href="<%= @url %>"><%= @url %></a></p>

<p>If you have any questions, feel free to contact our support team.</p>

<p>Best regards,<br>The Team</p>

# app/views/user_mailer/welcome_email.text.erb
Welcome, <%= @user.name %>!

Thank you for signing up for our application.

To get started, please visit: <%= @url %>

If you have any questions, feel free to contact our support team.

Best regards,
The Team

# app/views/user_mailer/password_reset.html.erb
<h2>Password Reset Request</h2>

<p>Hi <%= @user.name %>,</p>

<p>We received a request to reset your password. Click the link below to create a new password:</p>

<p><a href="<%= @reset_url %>">Reset Password</a></p>

<p>This link will expire in 2 hours.</p>

<p>If you didn't request this, please ignore this email.</p>

<p>Best regards,<br>The Team</p>

# app/views/user_mailer/password_reset.text.erb
Password Reset Request

Hi <%= @user.name %>,

We received a request to reset your password. Click the link below to create a new password:

<%= @reset_url %>

This link will expire in 2 hours.

If you didn't request this, please ignore this email.

Best regards,
The Team

<p>Hi <%= @user.name %>,</p>

<p><%= @message %></p>

<p>Best regards,<br>The Team</p>

Hi <%= @user.name %>,

<%= @message %>

Best regards,
The Team

# app/views/user_mailer/custom_email.html.erb
<%= simple_format(@body) %>

# app/views/user_mailer/custom_email.text.erb
<%= @body %>

# app/views/admin_mailer/system_alert.html.erb
<h2>System Alert: <%= @alert_type %></h2>

<p><strong>Timestamp:</strong> <%= @timestamp %></p>

<h3>Details:</h3>
<%= simple_format(@details) %>

# app/views/admin_mailer/system_alert.text.erb
System Alert: <%= @alert_type %>

Timestamp: <%= @timestamp %>

Details:
<%= @details %>

# app/views/admin_mailer/daily_report.html.erb
<h2>Daily Report - <%= @date %></h2>

<%= simple_format(@report_data) %>

# app/views/admin_mailer/daily_report.text.erb
Daily Report - <%= @date %>

<%= @report_data %>

# lib/tasks/test_mailer.rake
namespace :mailer do
  desc 'Test SendGrid email delivery'
  task test: :environment do
    unless ENV['SENDGRID_API_KEY'].present?
      puts 'Error: SENDGRID_API_KEY not set'
      exit 1
    end

    test_email = ENV['TEST_EMAIL'] || 'test@example.com'
    
    user = OpenStruct.new(
      name: 'Test User',
      email: test_email
    )

    begin
      UserMailer.welcome_email(user).deliver_now
      puts "Test email sent successfully to #{test_email}"
    rescue => e
      puts "Error sending email: #{e.message}"
      puts e.backtrace.join("\n")
      exit 1
    end
  end
end
